languages.text: "Простите за неудобство, Лорд-капитан! Уж не знаю, что здесь произошло, но основная посадочная площадка полностью покрыта водой. Нам повезло, что запасная осталась нетронутой". {n}Пилот опасливо изучает лужи горящего прометия вокруг шаттла.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Уважаемый ВТ, с площадкой полный треш, дальше придется ножками, иначе угробим шатл

languages.text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Простите за неудобство, Лорд-капитан! Уж не знаю, что здесь произошло, но основная посадочная площадка полностью покрыта водой. Нам повезло, что запасная осталась нетронутой". {n}Пилот опасливо изучает лужи горящего прометия вокруг шаттла.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

"Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

"Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

languages.text: 「申し訳ございません、艦長様。何が起きたのかはわかりませんが、メインの着陸場が完全に水没しています。幸い、セカンダリー・パッドは使用可能です」{n}パイロットは、シャトルの周囲で燃え盛るプロメシウムのたまりを警戒しながら見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「申し訳ございません、艦長様。何が起きたのかはわかりませんが、メインの着陸場が完全に水没しています。幸い、セカンダリー・パッドは使用可能です。」{n}パイロットは、シャトルの周囲で燃え盛るプロメシウムのたまりを警戒しながら見つめている。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Lamento las molestias, Lord Capitán! No sé lo que ha sucedido, pero la plataforma principal está completamente sumergida. Tenemos suerte de que la secundaria siga operativa». {n}El piloto mira cautelosamente los charcos de prometio que arden en torno a la lanzadera.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Lamento las molestias, Lord Capitán! No sé lo que ha sucedido, pero la plataforma principal está completamente sumergida. Tenemos suerte de que la secundaria siga operativa». {n}El piloto mira cautelosamente los charcos de prometio que arden en torno a la lanzadera.{/n}

languages.text: “抱歉给您添乱了，舰长大人！我也不知道怎么回事，但主停机坪已完全被水淹没。幸好备用平台还能用。”{n}飞行员紧张地瞄着穿梭机周围燃烧的钷素坑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “抱歉给您添乱了，舰长大人！我也不知道怎么回事，但主停机坪已完全被水淹没。幸好备用平台还能用。”{n}飞行员紧张地瞄着穿梭机周围燃烧的钷素坑。{/n}

languages.text: "Bitte entschuldigt die Unannehmlichkeiten, Lord Captain! Ich weiß nicht, was hier passiert ist, aber der primäre Landeplatz steht komplett unter Wasser. Wir haben Glück, dass der zweite noch nutzbar ist." {n}Der Pilot beäugt argwöhnisch die um das Shuttle herum brennenden Promethiumpfützen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bitte entschuldigt die Unannehmlichkeiten, Lord Captain! Ich weiß nicht, was hier passiert ist, aber der primäre Landeplatz steht komplett unter Wasser. Wir haben Glück, dass der zweite noch nutzbar ist." {n}Der Pilot beäugt argwöhnisch die um das Shuttle herum brennenden Promethiumpfützen.{/n}

languages.text: "Rahatsızlık için özür dilerim Lord Kaptan! Burada ne oldu bilmiyorum ama ana iniş pisti tamamen sular altında. İkincil pist hâlâ kullanılabilir olduğu için şanslıyız." {n}Pilot, mekiğin etrafında yanan prometyum birikintilerine temkinli bir şekilde bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Rahatsızlık için özür dilerim Lord Kaptan! Burada ne oldu bilmiyorum ama ana iniş pisti tamamen sular altında. İkincil pist hâlâ kullanılabilir olduğu için şanslıyız." {n}Pilot, mekiğin etrafında yanan prometyum birikintilerine temkinli bir şekilde bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Toutes mes excuses, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! J'ignore ce qui s'est passé, mais la plateforme d'atterrissage principale est complètement submergée. Heureusement, celle de secours est encore utilisable. » {n}Le pilote jette un regard méfiant aux flaques de prométhium qui brûlent autour de la navette.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Toutes mes excuses, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! J'ignore ce qui s'est passé, mais la plateforme d'atterrissage principale est complètement submergée. Heureusement, celle de secours est encore utilisable. » {n}Le pilote jette un regard méfiant aux flaques de prométhium qui brûlent autour de la navette.{/n}
